_comment: Notion property schema for the AI50 State database. Used by setup wizard (Step 5b.1) to create the DB; ALSO used by run-job-search Step P-3 to recreate the DB if it goes missing. Job IDs are stored in each row's PAGE BODY (as a fenced ```json code block), NOT as a property — this avoids Notion's 2000-char per-rich-text-block silent truncation. The 'Job count' number column is convenience for at-a-glance verification (and a tripwire for detecting truncated state).
